case_title: KATSNELSON, ILANA VS GAW, ALAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KATSNELSON, ILANA AS TO DEFENDANT GAW, ALAN FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP CLAIM OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GAW, ALAN FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP CLAIM OFFICE
